title: Easy Leafy Seadragon Coloring Page
seoTitle: Easy Leafy Seadragon Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: A cute and simple leafy seadragon coloring sheet for preschool children. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Similar to seahorses, the male leafy Leafy Seadragon carries the eggs on his tail until they hatch.
Leafy Leafy Seadragons are masters of camouflage, featuring leaf-like skin extensions that make them look exactly like drifting seaweed.
